expectations.text: Treats this as a marketing copy task and delivers actual sign/flyer text
expectations.evidence: Triggers despite typos/casual tone; delivers two ready sign options.

expectations.text: Provides at least 2 distinct headline or sign-copy options
expectations.evidence: Option A (sensory) and Option B (offer) are distinct.

expectations.text: At least one option gives passersby a concrete reason to stop
expectations.evidence: 'Fresh Espresso, Pulled to Order' (sensory) and a named special with chalk drink suggestion.
Arrows pointing to the cart, 'two steps away', and an order suggestion.

expectations.text: Does not invent a specific price or discount as fact; any figure is an adjustable placeholder
expectations.evidence: Price shown as [$X] with explicit 'set the real price' note.
